Nodes.PromptText: As you might have noticed, I'm a little busy at the moment.

Options.Text: Actually, Rex said you could help me... I seem to have misplaced my Identity Card.

Actions.Text: Safe close action for captured Goodbye option.

Nodes.PromptText: Well now. Sounds like you got a problem. I'm not going to say I can't help you but, well, as you'll find out soon enough, everyone on Rubi-Ka needs something...

Options.Text: So, let me guess... You need some help with the fire?
Options.TextEvidence: KnuBotAnswerList 2026-06-15T00:51:47.9429581Z, 20260614-195107/chat-dialogue.log lines 11-12; selected answer index 0 at 2026-06-15T00:51:49.0685084Z.

Actions.Text: Safe close action for captured Goodbye option.

Nodes.PromptText: A little smirk crosses his lips as he nods his approval.\n\nYeah, now you're catching on. As you have already noticed, a few, small fires have erupted up on this landing platform. The appropriate authorities are on their way to deal with the wounded and property damage, but if you wouldn't mind helping me with a few of these fires, it would be appreciated. You do that, I'll see if I can't help you out with your little... identity issue.
